# NexaCorp

## About
NexaCorp is a technology and consulting company that delivers cutting-edge solutions for forward-thinking enterprises. We specialize in custom development, data analytics, cybersecurity, strategic consulting, team augmentation, and cloud solutions.

## Services
- Custom Software Development
- Data Analytics
- Cybersecurity
- Strategy Consulting
- Team Augmentation
- Cloud Solutions

## Pricing
- Starter: $29/month
- Professional: $79/month
- Enterprise: $199/month
